programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: A comedic send-up of the grim circumstances of the Middle Ages as told through the story of King Arthur and framed by a modern-day murder investigation. When the mythical king of the Britons leads his knights on a quest for the Holy Grail, they face a wide array of horrors, including a persistent Black Knight, a three-headed giant, a cadre of shrubbery-challenged knights, the perilous Castle Anthrax, a killer rabbit, a house of virgins, and a handful of rude Frenchmen.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: After a string of bizarre bank robberies in Southern California, with the crooks donning masks of various former presidents, a federal agent, Johnny Utah (Keanu Reeves), infiltrates the suspected gang. But this is no ordinary group of robbers. They're surfers -- led by the charismatic Bodhi (Patrick Swayze) -- who are addicted to the rush of thievery. But when Utah falls in love with a female surfer, Tyler (Lori Petty), who is close to the gang, it complicates his sense of duty.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between the youngest daughter of a merchant who has fallen on hard times and the mysterious beast her father owes a debt to.

programme.title: A Monster in Paris
programme.desc: Raoul and Emile accidentally release a monster from an eccentric scientist's greenhouse and vow to track it down. They soon realize the beast may not be as menacing as it appears and try to save it from a corrupt police chief.

programme.title: First Born
programme.desc: Following the arrival of a sinister nanny, an anxious new mom (Elisabeth Shue) verges on a nervous breakdown.

programme.title: Quicksand
programme.desc: Banker Martin Raikes (Michael Keaton) heads to Monaco to investigate strange financial activity surrounding a film production that his bank is financing. There he encounters the film's star, the washed-up, hard-drinking one-time action star Jake Mellows (Michael Caine). Before he can conduct a thorough investigation, Raikes finds himself framed for the assassination of a government official. With both crooks and the law out to get him, Raikes goes on the run, eventually hooking up with Mellows.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) is a young FBI agent who is given a difficult assignment: spy on his mother (Meg Ryan) and her boyfriend (Antonio Banderas) who is suspected of leading a gang of art thieves.

programme.title: Marilyn Monroe Declassified
programme.desc: Declassified FBI and CIA documents help unravel the puzzle of Marilyn Monroe's demise, which was ruled a "probable suicide," while providing evidence suggesting that Marilyn was murdered.

programme.title: Retrograde
programme.desc: Two opposing time travelers are sent back to the present to prevent a global biological disaster from occurring.

programme.title: Thrill Seekers
programme.desc: When intrepid reporter Tom Merrick discovers that the same man appears in photographs of major disasters over a hundred-year period, he embarks on an incredible action-filled race against time to prevent a series of new disasters.

programme.title: Police Story: Lockdown
programme.desc: While visiting his estranged daughter at a nightclub, a police captain (martial arts legend Jackie Chan) must spring into action when an elaborate kidnapping plan unravels right before his eyes. Subtitled.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A rural Montana community is threatened when the FBI tries to arrest members of a radical militia group. The militia retaliates by releasing a killer virus into the air, sickening most of the local residents -- but not Dr. Wesley McClaren (Steven Seagal) or his daughter, Holly (Gailard Sartain). It seems that Holly is immune to the virus. As McClaren races to find a cure, militia leader Floyd Chisolm (L.Q. Jones) attempts to kidnap Holly so that his group can make an antitoxin.

programme.title: The Country House Revealed
programme.desc: In a six-part series, architectural historian Dan Cruickshank visits houses in Britain never before open to public view, including South Wraxall Manor, Kinross House in Scotland, Easton Neston, Wentworth Woodhouse, Clandeboye in Northern Ireland, and Marshcourt. Cruickshank roams the corridors and rummages in the cellars as he tells the story of each house -- who built them, the generations who lived in them, and the families who lost them.

programme.title: Race Across The World S01 E01
programme.desc: Five pairs of Brits set off on an epic 12,000-mile overland journey from London to Singapore—without flights or smartphones. Facing tight budgets, language barriers, and emotional trials, the race begins with dramatic detours, new friendships, tearful setbacks, and ingenious hustles. From cramped coaches to ferry delays, who will outsmart the others and reach the first checkpoint in Delphi, Greece, ahead of the pack?

programme.title: Race Across The World S01 E02
programme.desc: As the race continues, the teams journey from Greece to Azerbaijan, facing a brutal new twist—elimination for the last to reach Baku. Tensions flare, friendships deepen, and emotions rise as daring detours, costly mistakes, and clever strategies shape the leaderboard. From ancient Athens to the Turkish border and beyond, every mile matters. Who will push forward—and who will fall behind?

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigan's Muskegon River. He'll paddle his canoe through the marsh to camp and bow fish for sucker, bowfin, and gar. With the rich bounty of overlooked aquatic foods that can be found in this freshwater paradise, he'll demonstrate how beat the heat by salt curing fish and later he'll prepare a camp meal of fried gar.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt in the wilderness of British Columbia. Here, they'll face one of the most dangerous moments in Steve's life as a hunter. But they'll also enjoy one the best wild game meals they've ever tasted.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve must deal with bad weather and fierce competition during a late-season central Montana elk hunt. With some tips from a friend, Steve encounters plenty of elk on this public land hunt. But he'll have to hike hard in steep country and deep snow to get to the elk and away from other hunters.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren give comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen their first taste of Midwest deer hunting culture by sitting in freezing ground blinds on opening day in Wisconsin. It just wouldn't be a trip to the Duren Family Farm without a little trapping and duck hunting thrown in, rounding out the larder for a big wild game feast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren give comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen their first taste of Midwest deer hunting culture by sitting in freezing ground blinds on opening day in Wisconsin. It just wouldn't be a trip to the Duren Family Farm without a little trapping and duck hunting thrown in, rounding out the larder for a big wild game feast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend and wild turkey specialist, Robert Abernathy, head to southern Florida to hunt Osceola gobblers. Steve hopes to finish off his Royal Turkey Slam, achieved by bagging all five subspecies of the American wild turkey‚Äîa quest that's been a decade in the making. These two turkey hunting fanatics celebrate with a delicious meal of grilled and stuff wild wild turkey breast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Boone and Bugles: Kentucky Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is invited by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation for a special opportunity to hunt elk during the rut in the mountainous coal country of southeastern Kentucky, a place where his hero Daniel Boone once roamed. This is Steve's first eastern elk hunt, and he quickly realizes that the rules of the game here are different. If he manages to track one down, he'll prepare what was supposedly Boone's favorite meal: elk liver.

programme.title: Dwayne Perkins
programme.desc: Dwayne Perkins has earned a spot in today's elite class of stand-up comics with appearances on Comedy Central and on Conan. He's getting a lot of buzz for his recurring piece on The Jay Leno Show entitled "Great White Moments in Black History." Dwayne's Comedy Central half-hour special, a culmination of his talent and hard work, was very well received. It showcases his way of looking at life and his ability to convey it in a hilarious manner. Dwayne can be seen in the HBO movie The Gristle. Dwayne has also appeared in several commercials pushing products for The Man. Dwayne is part of The Bob & Tom Comedy Tour in addition to headlining colleges and comedy clubs across the country.

programme.title: Dennis Gaxiola
programme.desc: In Bible School Dropout, Dennis Gaxiola returns to the stage with fresh stories from faith, fatherhood, and his realization that God called him to make others laugh with his Bible knowledge... just not as a Bible school graduate.

programme.title: K-Von

programme.title: Eric O Shea
programme.desc: Eric O'Shea has been active in the comedy business for 25 years. He has performed in L.A. with Betty White at the Creative Emmy Awards and has appeared on America's Got Talent TV Show. Every year since 1997, Eric has performed an average of 70 shows a year, and has received 7 nominations as the “National College Comedian of the Year”

programme.title: Rodney Norman: You Have To Stay Focused
programme.desc: Rodney Norman will keep you laughing with his hysterical insights into his daily journey into understanding the world. Rodney makes the simple things in life seem complex and strange and the complex and strange seem normal and common place. He has entertained audiences around the US with his unique point of view. Winner of the Rhode Island Comedy Festival and has been featured at the Boston Comedy Festival. From raising kids, serving in the Marine Corps, and Studying philosophy Rodney has a little bit of everything for everybody. His style is inviting, captivating, smart, and clean.

programme.title: Lucas Bohn
programme.desc: LUCAS BOHN is energetic with an edge. The perfect blend of schoolboy charm and bad-boy charisma, his comedy is both smart and audacious. Known as the little guy who generates big laughs, Lucas has shared the stage with Dave Chappelle, Jimmy Fallon, and Kevin Hart. Lucas' high-energy shows and hilarious impersonations make him an instant hit with audiences of all ages. In 2013 Lucas was nominated "Comedian of the Year" by Campus Activities Magazine.

programme.title: Salamander Scavenger Hunt! – How Many Will We Find?!

programme.title: Stung by Meanest Scorpion in Thailand!

programme.desc: Today, cruise ships tilt, houses succumb to blizzards, and wind stops people in their tracks.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Bubble, Bubble, Hail & Trouble
programme.desc: Tornadoes twist at sea, hail pounds the Earth, and trees topple over on today's Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Speed of Lightning
programme.desc: Thunderstorms come out to play with powerful booms, brilliant flashes, and enough force to take down trees!

programme.title: Go Buster
programme.desc: Join Buster's adventures! He gets a giant ice cream, gets stuck in a slimy puddle, & uses his rainbow power.

programme.title: KiiYii
programme.desc: It's time for fun! The animals have escaped from Old MacDonald's farm, & the London Bridge has fallen down.

programme.title: KiiYii
programme.desc: Let's be kind to each other! The friends rescue a kitty from a well & help a friend who is being bullied.

programme.title: KiiYii
programme.desc: Let's learn with song! Count the buses, learn your ABCs & discover all the different shapes with Kii & Yii.

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: Get ready for bite-size mayhem! Seven furry friends turn simple situations into hilarious chaos.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: Learning is an adventure! Sing your way through the alphabet with JJ & then count to ten.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.sub-title: Clean Up and Get Ready With JJ
programme.desc: Let's get ready for the day! JJ learns how to make daily routines like cleaning up a fun game.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: It's a beautiful day to spend with family! Join JJ as he sings about all the people he loves.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: If you're happy, sing along! Join "Little Bunny Foo Foo," sing with Old MacDonald's farm animals, & have fun.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids.

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Come sing along with baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill in Little Angel!

programme.title: Meekah
programme.desc: Meekah and her best friend Blippi have exciting and educational adventures together.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: There is so much to learn about, it will make you want to shout ‘BLIPPI'!

programme.title: Antiks
programme.desc: Join the 2 sibling ants Joey & Boo who have an appetite for food and minuscule levels of mass-destruction.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.sub-title: Learn To Move and Shake with Blippi!
programme.desc: Blippi visits the Allegro Performing Arts Academy and learns some fun new dance routines.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi is ready to take on the tiniest sport there is… mini golf!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi heads to the Gourmandise Cooking School to learn about Creole food.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Filmed at Magic House in St. Louis

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi learns about helicopters and takes a helicopter tour over the Hawaiian island of Oahu.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi learns about different shapes and colors as he jumps and plays at the Jungle Fun Park!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi doubles the fun in two racing adventures! Experience the thrill at an Adventure Park with super-fast races. Get ready for a turbo-charged journey filled with action and fun!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.sub-title: Blippi & Meekah's Game Show:Episode 4 - Mighty Excavator
programme.desc: Join Blippi and Meekah for some flags, raptors, and dancing! One team wins a Discovery Cube prize!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi journeys through a safari on a search for a platypus, seeing all kinds of different animals.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi visits the Mount Wilson observatory to learn about cool things we can see in our night sky.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Another day of learning and play awaits us at Skyzone!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn About Space and Sky
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Wendy lays a garden path for Mrs Potts. / Bob, Wendy and the Machines make the town a nicer place to live.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: While refurbishing Farmer Pickles' cottage Bob finds a hedgehog. / Bob builds a shed in Farmer Pickles' field.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: One Shot Wendy / Spud Lends A Hand
programme.desc: Wendy takes the Machines to build a Crazy Golf course. / Bob puts a rainwater tank in Farmer Pickles' field.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Bob On The Run / Forget-Me-Knot Bob
programme.desc: Mrs Percival is raising money for a new sports paviliont. Bob has a new personal organizer.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Roley & The Rockstar / Scruffty The Detective
programme.desc: Bob is installing a garden pond for rock star Lennie Lazenby. / The museum curator is planning a Time Capsule.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Paving slabs are delivered for a special job. / Bob is digging a ditch, but notices something in the trench.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building some traffic calming measures. Bob has been working all night laying lino.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Spud The Dragon / Pilchard Steals The Show
programme.desc: Bob is insulating Mrs. Potts' loft. Wendy is building an enclosure for the local dog show.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a 'hide' for the bird-watching society. / Wendy is planning a picnic, when Mr Ellis calls.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob's new metal detector is delivered. / Bob is installing a new pizza oven for Mr Sabatini.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Bob's Egg And Spoon Race / Trix's Tiles
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race. / Bob is tiling a roof.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Mr Sabatini's Smashing Day / Roley To The Rescue
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. / After a stormy night Wendy has to mend a chimney pot at Mrs Potts'.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Spud's Big Splash / Spud The Musketeer
programme.desc: Bob is building a water feature in Mrs Potts' garden. / Wendy is making a floral display for the town square.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Mr Beasley's New Friends / Spud The Pilot
programme.desc: Bob is repairing a leaking water tank at school. / Bob is installing an antique fireplace for Mrs Percival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival. Strawberry thinks the festival will provide a wonderful opportunity to see the world through different eyes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: When the Berry Fairy Came to Stay
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry's open window. She is a klutzy little thing who is convinced she will always be a major goof-up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple Dumplin' wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin's just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's winter and the pond's frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate! They decide to showcase their talents at an Ice Dance Show. But just then, a new kid named Apricot shows up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & her friends decide to put on a talent show, they plan to enter themselves as a band, The Strawberry Jams!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After an accidental wager with Purple Pieman, Strawberry sets off to prove that she can go around the world in 80 days.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: As Strawberry & Friends visit a Career Fair, they ponder their own futures. They all have thoughts on the jobs they would like: teacher, firefighter, doctor, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Great Green Adventure
programme.desc: In this special episode, Blippi celebrates Earth Day with his Great Green Adventure. Caring for the environment is one of our prime responsibilities and Blippi teaches children how by taking them on a puzzle-solving adventure.

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community. Plum suggests that she teach music lessons Plum has always wanted to learn the drums, as it would enhance her ability to give dance lessons with live rhythmic accompaniment.

programme.title: Link into the VRAINS
programme.desc: n Den City, duels are held in the highly advanced VR world Link VRAINS, which is always under attack by the Knights of Hanoi. However, a hero named Playmaker has arrived to face the Knights, capturing a program they want called an Ignis.

programme.title: Seize the Wind!
programme.desc: Playmaker continues his duel with the Knight of Hanoi using the new Speed Duel rules. Playmaker is backed into a corner by the Knight's Cracking Dragon, but a data storm soon envelopes the field and Playmaker activates his Skill.

programme.title: Blippi's Summer Games
programme.desc: Blippi is back with Blippi's Sports Summer Games Movie For Kids!

programme.title: Top Talent
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival. Strawberry and Cherry are going to sing a duet, Orange is going to juggle, Plum will perform a ballet, Blueberry is writing and directing a play that the Berrykins will perform, Lemon will design animal-shaped hairstyles and display them herself, Princess Berrykin is going to yodel, and Berrykin Bloom will to do a stand-up comedy routine. Raspberry, who was the big star of the music recital (with only nine mistakes), is going to perform her same keyboard piece.

programme.title: A Star is Fashioned
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores—everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy. During Raspberry's preliminary trip to the city to begin arrangements for her new design studio, her friends get a taste of life without her. They miss her, and it makes them sad. Cherry admits to Strawberry that she's concerned for Raspberry—stardom is not all it's cracked up to be. We see that Cherry was worried about her friend, not jealous. Raspberry returns to pack up her little boutique. Her friends barely recognize her.

programme.title: Blippi's Alphabet and Transportation Adventures
programme.desc: Join Blippi on a series of exciting educational journeys where he uncovers the Case of the Missing ABCs, explores the charming Ranch at the Pier, and delves into London's rich transportation history at both the Transport Museum and the RAF Museum. From solving puzzles and meeting farm animals to discovering vintage buses and historic airplanes, Blippi makes learning an adventure filled with curiosity and fun.

programme.title: Blippi's Fun and Colorful Exploration
programme.desc: Get ready for a vibrant and entertaining escapade with Blippi as he dives into a world of colors at Billy Beez, creates a whimsical pizza in the kitchen, transforms into a playful pirate on a treasure hunt, and explores the fascinating world of dinosaurs at the Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History. Each adventure is packed with laughter, creativity, and educational moments, making learning a joyful experience for kids.

programme.desc: Jelly Jamm celebrates music, fun and friendship.

programme.desc: Stinky and Jake welcome a Turtle and a Wildebeest to the show.

programme.title: Animal Show With Stinky And Jake

programme.sub-title: Prank You Very Much / Boys VS Girls

programme.title: Counting With Paula

programme.desc: Mr. Dragon is offering free rides to children today! He just has one simple rule.

programme.title: Leo, The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: A Siberian Chipmunk has stolen Kai's smell capsule which holds the smell of a very, very rare animal.

programme.title: Leo, The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers invent a new mechanical leg for a Japanese Spider Crab.

programme.title: Leo, The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Kai needs a photo of the majestic Golden Pheasant for a photography competition.

programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Castaways: Stranded! The Super K's accidentally took off in a hot air balloon without Mr. Arnold and crashed onto a deserted island. If they want to make it out of there, they have to band together to find food, water, shelter, and — hey, what are those mysterious footprints?

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - How The Super Ks Save Christmas, Part 1: The Super K's must stop Nigel Danforth and his Fearsome Foursome from cancelling Christmas forever.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Sneaking Lying Ninja Koopas: King Koopa plans to kidnap Prince Hugo so he can turn him into a poodle and turns Cheatsy, Bully, Big Mouth and Kooky into Sneaky Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas which Mario and friends would have to save the prince. / When Kootie Pie whines that she did not have enough presents on her birthday, King Koopa takes the White House to the Mushroom Kingdom so Kootie Pie can be empress of America which Mario and friends must save the president.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Reign Storm: Princess Toadstool and Toad go to Hawaii for a vacation while leaving the Mario Bros. in charge of the Mushroom Kingdom. / King Koopa and Kooky plan to go to the place where the Mario Bros. have gone into the Mushroom Kingdom by using a time travel device.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Rescue / Shaq's Secret Birthday: Zoo keepers at the Orlanta Zoo ask for the Paq's help to transport and release two turtles into their natural habitat, Crystal Lake. Gronk and Tibbs set out after picking up the turtles, but Gronk's carelessness ends up putting the turtles in danger. Tibbs and Gronk must figure out a way to save the turtles and get the home successfully. / When the Paq decided to throw Shaq a surprise part for his birthday, they fan out over Orlanta in an attempt to get his favorite food, singer, and cake. Unfortunately nothing goes right and the Paq has to scramble to fix everything before Shaq comes home.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Secret of Rockyhenge / The Case of The Crimson Car: Ranger Raoul accidentally knows over one of the giant stones at Rockyhenge. After he calls the Paq in to help lift it back up into place, Biggie D, Gronk, and Himari inadvertently make it worse. They have to scramble to put everything back into place before the Head Ranger shows up. / After Miguel's beloved car is stolen, the Paq is tasked with finding out who did it. Dawkins and Tibbs are on the case, but they have no idea the notorious thief James Moriarty is behind the theft. Dawkins and Tibbs must use every investigative skill they have to the test to find the criminal and the stolen car.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Ride The Wild Pac-topus: When Pac is asked to hold on to a golden key, Dr. Buttocks tries to steal it by using his re-programmed mind-control chip to control attractions at a carnival.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Meanie Genie: Pac is tricked into finding a bottle holding a genie who promises to grant his every wish.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Who's Your Daddy?: One of Jet-Vac's eggs hatches, producing an evil baby greeble.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Sheep(ball) Dreams: When Dreamcatcher gets amnesia, the Skylanders bring her back to the Academy in the hopes of reforming her.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - Lia and Fenneca / Lightning and Ferascal: Lia and her new Bakugan Fenneca find themselves in a bit of trouble after a run in with an old enemy. / The Awesome Brawlers meet Crystal Blue, a mysterious, young girl who has been dubbed the Bakugan whisperer.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - A Former Thief and a Laid Back Dude / My Name is Sharktar: Ajit, Lia and Lighting have a run in with Strata, the Bakugan hunter. / McQ is after new state of the art Kazami tech! But McQ will have to get through Shun and his new partner Sharktar if he wants to complete this heist.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Everything's Relative: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus!

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles are taken prisoners by the Wolves. But Laval is determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue ... but something about ShadoWind isn't quite right.

programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all - in the form of the T-Rex.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space. Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal. Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way. The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album.NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.”

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy. The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence. NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.” RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released. all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles,

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy.

programme.title: Omer Avital
programme.sub-title: Omer Avital Qantar - Jazz in Duketown
programme.desc: Jazz in Duketown is the largest free outdoor jazz festival in the Netherlands. It's a real gathering for jazz addicts, inviting internationally renowned artists. Israeli-American double bassist Omer Avital plays radiantly energetic, resounding jazz with oriental influences. At Jazz in Duketown 2019, Avital forms a quintet with saxophonists Asaf Yuria and Alexander Levin, drummer Ofri Nehemya, and pianist Eden Ladin. They present singular repertoire from Avital's album 'Qantar'.

programme.title: Al Jarreau, Tom Canning, Peter Robinson & Ralph Humphrey
programme.sub-title: Al Jarreau - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1981, American singer and Grammy Award winner Al Jarreau gave an unforgettable performance for the audience of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague, the Netherlands.

programme.title: Jimmy Smith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Chet Baker
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential male jazz and pop vocalists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Delight in the expressive beauty and emotional depth of Chet Baker's rendition of “Time After Time” and “You Don't Know What Love Is", recorded live in Brussels, Belgium in 1964 and in Rome, Italy in 1956 respectively. Revel in Frank Sinatra's iconic version of “I've Got You Under My Skin". Immerse yourself in Dizzy Gillespie's dynamic performance of “Let Me Outta Here”, recorded live in Denmark in 1970. Enjoy Tony Bennett's unforgettable performance of “It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing)” at London's majestic Royal Albert Hall in 1974. Let the haunting beauty of Nat King Cole's 1957 performance of “Autumn Leaves” and Louis Armstrong's performance of “Basin Street Blues” from 1959 delight you. Dean Martin's smooth vocal stylings will enthrall you as he performs the jazz standard “Wrap Your Troubles In Dreams". Witness the electrifying energy of Sammy Davis Jr.'s performance of “Too Close For Comfort”. Join us for this unforgettable musical experience that you'll surely cherish!

programme.title: Thelonious Monk, Charlie Rouse, Ben Riley & Larry Gales
programme.desc: The idiosyncratic pianist and composer Thelonious Monk (1917-1982) is one of the all-time greats of jazz. His music went largely misunderstood for the first 15 years of his career, after which he was rightly hailed as a genius, and received credit as a founding father of bebop. Several concerts from his 1966 European tour were recorded for television, featuring his quartet of Charles Rouse (tenor saxophone), Lawrence Gales (bass) and Benjamin Riley (drums). His quartet performed Epistrophy, 'Round Midnight, and Lulu's Back in Town in Warsaw for Polish television on April 4, 1966. On April 17, the same quartet performed a short set in Copenhagen for Danish television, featuring Lulu's Back in Town, Don't Blame Me, and Epistrophy.

programme.title: Yumi Ito
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Charlie Parker
programme.desc: The documentary The Story of Jazz is a seamless array of performances, commentary, and compelling historic insights about jazz, zooming in on the cross-cultural influences that produced this constantly evolving and enduring music. Many call jazz the greatest art form of the 20th century. This absorbing weave of sounds, rare film clips, stills and interviews shows how this truly American expression spread to become a universal, musical language, from the New Orleans traditions, stride, swing, boogie woogie, big band, jump band, blues, bebop, Afro-Cuban, cool, and free-form, to jazz vocalists and dancers… Never before have the filmed comments of so many important great jazz artists been assembled for one project, and never before has the history of jazz been told as vividly and with such attention to historic detail.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Salif Keita, Souleymane Dournbia, Lansine Kouyate & N'Doumbé
programme.desc: Salif Keita's music is a rich combination of traditional Malian music with European and American influences. We can hear this in the instrumentation of Keita's music, which varies from traditional West-African instruments to Western European ones. The Malian singer was cast out by his family because of his albinism. In 1967 he moved to Bamako, where he started his musical career and joined Les Ambassadeurs (Internationaux). He achieved international acknowledgement with this band in the 1970s. After spending a couple of years in Ivory Coast, Salif has found his home base in Paris since 1984. During this 2010 concert, he proves to be rightfully referred to as “The Golden Voice of Africa”.

programme.title: Leonardo García Alarcón, Cappella Mediterranea & Mariana Flores
programme.sub-title: Vocal baroque works by Cavalli, Strozzi & Bembo
programme.desc: Argentinian conductor and harpsichordist Leonardo García Alarcón leads his ensemble Cappella Mediterranea in a program of Italian Baroque music. The ensemble performs some of the finest Baroque pieces composed by Francesco Cavalli, a prominent composer in 17th-century Venice, and two of his famous students, Barbara Strozzi and Antonia Bembo. Argentinian soprano Mariana Flores presents the vocal works. On the program are ‘Mira questi due lumi' from Cavalli's Le nozze di Teti e di Peleo, ‘Dimmi, Amor, che farò' from L'Oristeo, ‘Sinfonia della notte' from L'Egisto, and ‘E vuol dunque Ciprigna' from Ercole Amante ‘M'ingannasti in verità' from Bembo's Produzioni armoniche consacrate a Luigi XIV Strozzi's Sino alla morte, Che si può fare, Lagrime mie, L'amante segreto, and è Pazzo il moi core Biagio Marini's La Romanesca Tarquinio Merula's Aria Sopra La Cieccona and Dario Castello's Sonata Seconda. This performance was recorded at the magnificent Église Notre-Dame of Sablé-sur-Sarthe, France, on August 26, 2020.

programme.title: Claudio Abbado, Berliner Philharmoniker, Mirella Freni & Christine Schäfer
programme.sub-title: Gala from Berlin 1998 - Songs of Love and Desire
programme.desc: Featuring W. A. Mozart and Giuseppe Verdi, love is the theme of this 1998 New Year's Eve concert. Maestro Claudio Abbado selected two of the best Mozart interpreters, Christine Schäfer and Simon Keenlyside, for this traditionally meaningful event. Marcelo Álvarez from Argentina, who some compare to a young Domingo, sings highlights of the tenor repertoire, and Italian prima donna Mirella Freni tops the occasion with a breath-taking performance of the letter scene from Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Eugen Onegin.

programme.title: London Symphony Orchestra & Michael Tilson Thomas
programme.desc: American conductor Michael Tilson Thomas leads the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) in an energetic performance of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's folk-infused Symphony No. 2 in C minor, Op. 17. Written in 1872, the work is nicknamed 'Little Russian' as the composer used several folk tunes from Ukraine, then known as ‘Little Russia'. This performance was recorded at LSO St Luke's, London, on May 31, 2021.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98. Brahms completed his last symphony in 1885. He conducted the successful premiere of the piece in the German city of Meiningen in October of the same year. The symphony's finale movement is a chaconne, a variation form that reflects the composer's fascination with Baroque music. In this movement, Brahms borrowed an 8-measure theme from J. S. Bach's cantata ‘Nach dir, Herr, verlanget mich', BWV 150. The movement opens with the theme and then presents a set of variations all set over the same repeated theme in the bass. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Douglas Boyd, Orchestre de chambre de Paris, Accentus Chamber Choir & Carolyn Sampson
programme.desc: Composer George Frideric Handel's oratorio Messiah, HWV 56 is his best-known work. He wrote this choral masterpiece in just 24 days in 1741. Following its premiere in Dublin in 1742, the work has been immensely popular. The oratorio's three parts deal with the birth, death, and resurrection of Jesus Christ. Charles Jennens' libretto is based on texts from the Old and New Testament. In this performance, English conductor Douglas Boyd leads chamber choir Accentus and Orchestre de chambre de Paris. The soloists are soprano Carolyn Sampson, mezzosoprano Paula Murrihy, tenor Allan Clayton, and bass Matthew Rose. Captured at the Philharmonie de Paris on December 22, 2015, this performance underlines the enduring majesty of Handel's masterpiece.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.
